name: fhir-llm-clinical-dashboard
description: AI-powered clinical decision support system with RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)

scripts.install: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.install:backend: cd FHIR_LLM_UA/backend && [ -d ../venv ] || python3 -m venv ../venv && source ../venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run install && npm run setup:env
scripts.setup:env: echo 'Copy .env.example to .env and edit with your credentials' && cp .env.example .env 2>/dev/null || echo '.env.example not found'
